---
title: "Converting Agewell Codesheet to Long Format with WBmt Only"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r setup, include=TRUE}
# =============================
# Load Libraries and Read Data
# =============================
library(openxlsx)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)

# Define file paths
file_path <- "data/included_studies_1-13.xlsx" 
# Read Excel data starting from row 2 (headers start here)
data <- read.xlsx(file_path)

# Clean column names to remove unwanted characters and whitespace
clean_names <- function(x) {
  x <- gsub('["]', "", x)
  x <- gsub("&#10;?", "", x)
  x <- gsub("[\r\n]", "", x)
  x <- trimws(x)
  x <- gsub("\\s+", "", x)
  return(x)
}
names(data) <- clean_names(names(data))
```

```{r merge-interval-columns}
# ================================
# Extract and Merge Interval Columns
# ================================

# Define relevant columns
static_cols <- c("1_ID", "1.1_CaseID", "2_Author", "3_Year", "interval", "timepoints")

# Create list to store output rows
merged_rows <- list()

# Loop through rows in long_format
for (i in 1:nrow(long_format)) {
  row <- long_format[i, ]

  # Extract interval and parse i-j
  interval <- row$interval
  split <- str_split(interval, "-")[[1]]
  i_tp <- as.integer(split[1])
  j_tp <- as.integer(split[2])

  # Construct column names based on interval values
  WBmi_col <- grep(paste0("_WBmt", i_tp, "$"), names(row), value = TRUE)
  WBsdi_col <- grep(paste0("_WBsdt", i_tp, "$"), names(row), value = TRUE)
  WBmj_col <- grep(paste0("_WBmt", j_tp, "$"), names(row), value = TRUE)
  WBsdj_col <- grep(paste0("_WBsdt", j_tp, "$"), names(row), value = TRUE)
  WBcorr_col <- grep(paste0("_WBcort", i_tp, "t", j_tp, "$"), names(row), value = TRUE)
  WBt_col <- grep(paste0("_WBt", i_tp, "t", j_tp, "$"), names(row), value = TRUE)

  # Create compact row
  merged <- row[static_cols]
  merged$WBmi <- if (length(WBmi_col)) row[[WBmi_col]] else NA
  merged$WBsdi <- if (length(WBsdi_col)) row[[WBsdi_col]] else NA
  merged$WBmj <- if (length(WBmj_col)) row[[WBmj_col]] else NA
  merged$WBsdj <- if (length(WBsdj_col)) row[[WBsdj_col]] else NA
  merged$WBcorrij <- if (length(WBcorr_col)) row[[WBcorr_col]] else NA
  merged$WBtitj <- if (length(WBt_col)) row[[WBt_col]] else NA

  merged_rows[[length(merged_rows) + 1]] <- merged
}

# Combine all into final merged format
long_format_merged <- bind_rows(merged_rows)

# Preview the first few rows
head(long_format_merged)
```

```{r export-merged}
# ================================
# Export Merged DataFrame to Excel
# ================================
write.xlsx(long_format_merged, file = "C:/Users/Prerana/Desktop/long_format_merged_output.xlsx", rowNames = FALSE)
cat("\u2705 Merged long format file exported successfully.\n")
```
